programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

programme.title: Bad Education
programme.desc: A Long Island school superintendent and his assistant are credited with bringing the district unprecedented prestige. Frank is a master of positive messaging, whether before an audience of community leaders or in an office with a concerned student or parent. That changes when a student reporter uncovers an embezzlement scheme of epic proportions, prompting Frank to devise an elaborate cover-up.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie finds herself alone amid a media meltdown after news of her AI written show is somehow leaked to the public; Val is further shocked to discover that a member of her team has not signed a NDA.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie finds herself alone amid a media meltdown after news of her AI written show is somehow leaked to the public; Val is further shocked to discover that a member of her team has not signed a NDA.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: While Greg tries to support an increasingly emotional Katie, Dylan attempts to steer a promising student towards poetry; Sunny is delighted when Archie starts to engage more with her pregnancy.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: Music Box: Listening to Kenny G
programme.desc: Saxophonist Kenny G speaks candidly about his musical background, his stringent work ethic and his controversial standing in the jazz canon.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: The life and tragically short career of wunderkind rapper Juice WRLD; exclusive footage, unreleased music, and dozens of industry interviews that document Juice WRLD's struggles to navigate his rise to fame, his drug use, and mental health issues.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: An intimate exploration of Alanis Morissette and her groundbreaking 1995 album "Jagged Little Pill.".

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Prime Minister
programme.desc: Chronicling Jacinda Ardern's unexpected journey as New Zealand's 40th Prime Minister, this documentary offers an unfiltered window into her years in power.

programme.title: Escape From Kabul
programme.desc: Examining 18 days in August 2021, from the U.S. withdrawal of its troops from Afghanistan through the subsequent evacuation of tens of thousands of Afghan citizens from Kabul airport after the Taliban seized the city.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

programme.title: Alien 3
programme.desc: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Generation Por qué?
programme.desc: A woman pursues her acting dreams in New York City while enduring her very conservative parents.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Kevin dodges Jackie early in the morning and takes off to batting practice where he meets Eddie.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Akalitus is all over the staff: HR has mandated a urine sample from all the nurses.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: It's business as usual, except the hospital has been purchased by the multinational corporation Quantum Bay.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Jackie is detoxing in rehab. When she wakes, she meets her elderly roommate, an unfriendly klepto named Doris.

programme.title: Nurse Jackie
programme.desc: Worried about Grace, Jackie leaves rehab early against the medical advice of her counselor.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie
programme.desc: Sol takes care of Frankie after she has an earthquake freak-out, while Grace goes on her first date.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie

This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where the questions are all about logic and common sense and where the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show, but only some of them will get near the chance to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right for up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Musical comedy sequel. The Bellas are back and better than ever, but after being humiliated in front of the President of the United States of America, they are taken out of the Aca-Circuit. In order to clear their name and regain their status, the Bellas take on a seemingly impossible task - winning an international competition that no American team has ever won. In order to accomplish this task, they need to strengthen their friendship and sisterhood, then put on a show that no-one will forget.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Elsewhere, Joe uses his police stories to collaborate with Brian on a true crime novel with one of Joe's cases as the premise, but their investigation is soon thwarted by greedy journalists.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger and Klaus begin a secret affair after accidentally going on an online date. Elsewhere, Steve tries to catch Hayley's pink eye to avoid a school fitness test.

programme.title: American Dad!

Stan becomes addicted to dying after Roger tricks him into thinking that he had a heart attack, and Klaus takes Steve to Arizona State University for a college visit where a fraternity hazes him.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: The Spider House Rules: Animated comedy. Louise adopts a spider and discovers that keeping it around the Belcher home is a complicated matter, and Bob reconnects with old friends. [S,AD] S12 Ep17

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: The first episode of a comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. Something sinister is going on around the edges of Hounslow's Muslim community - meanwhile, life is getting complicated for junior doctor Abdulla. Torn between the Halloween party of the year hosted by his crush Amrita and the Eid gathering that his dear mother Bushra expects him to attend, Abdulla does his best to get to both - on top of upsetting his mum, the party isn't what Abdulla had hoped for as he is introduced to Amrita's lovely but irritatingly enthusiastic South African boyfriend Franck... however, a chance encounter with a shadowy figure at the bus stop on his way home gives a more supernatural end to this most disappointing of nights.

programme.desc: Canadian reality series following renowned pastry chef, master chocolatier and entrepreneur Steve Hodge as he works with beloved design guru Tiffany Pratt to reinvigorate North American bakeries on the brink of losing it all. This episode features Scott, who is the Bread Baron of Airdrie and crushing his sourdough game - however, his staff are running amok and he is 300,000 dollars in debt.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Bachelor Kyle's first home is lovely and also small - his dad Jack has helped him renovate the interior, but the backyard is still barren and unusable. To help Kyle throw the ultimate housewarming party, Brian and Sarah build a sexy sports pub, a lounge area, a firepit and a few extra surprises.

programme.title: Dress To Impress

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Food Stars USA

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.desc: Maria’s furious with Liam for selling his share of the factory without consulting her. Liam calms her down by saying he’s got a new business idea. Ted writes David a glowing reference. David gets the job at the Salon in town.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a well-known business tycoon is murdered at his country mansion, his feuding sons and unstable wife immediately fall under suspicion - meanwhile, Morse clashes with a new chief superintendent and becomes the unwitting victim of a hate campaign in the tabloid press.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series about a city policeman transplanted to the Yorkshire Dales. A series of burglaries appear to be targeting Maggie.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in Yorkshire. When a gangster moves his operation into the area, Nick works undercover to investigate, assisted by his former girlfriend Jill.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Teenager Danny Merrick thinks that he has seen a ghost at Winyard, a creepy house in the woods near Midsomer Newton, as his mother Anne tells house-hunters Caroline and Peter Cave that it could be just the remote cottage they are looking for - however, estate agent Harriet Davis won't let them view the house and claims it's under offer. Undeterred, the Caves visit Winyard... but are spooked and flee only to be garrotted with piano wire. Can Barnaby and acting DC Ben Jones catch their killer?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola tries to convince Rodney to write more stories, while David is furious to discover his girlfriend has received an advance from the publisher. Viv decides to leave.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna thinks she has spotted Freddie on CCTV footage and arranges a stakeout with Ross to catch him. Nicola is delighted to learn Rodney has finished another story.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony fails to impress Carla as he steps into Liam's shoes at the factory. Michelle decides to tackle Lloyd about Steve's fidelity, while David's new employer contacts Audrey.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle puts pressure on Lloyd to tell her what he and Steve got up to on their night out. Lloyd lies saying Steve ran up a huge debt in a casino. Audrey’s furious with Ted and David for forging a reference in her name. She threatens to phone David’s new employer but they talk her out of it. Tony tells Carla he’s got a masterplan for the factory. He wants to buy the Kabin and the garage and expand their loading bay out the front.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. A woman seeks justice when her husband suffers a fatal heart attack after confronting a burglar. Meanwhile, Greengrass prepares for the big gooseberry competition at the village fair.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass is trapped by a runaway digger and realises with horror that he has unearthed an unexploded wartime bomb. Nick is interviewing Station Master Hutton about a spate of railway thefts when he is called away to summon the Bomb Squad and to organise the evacuation of the local schoolchildren. But when Colin, a young train enthusiast, goes missing a huge search is mounted. Hutton befriends Colin, and ends up facing a murder charge when a body turns up in a peculiar place. As the experts continue their dangerous work, the bomb begins to tick and there is still no sign of Colin. Furthermore, when the bomb finally goes off and Bellamy surveys the wreckage, there is no sign of Nick.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. Joel Kingston is a copper's copper from a respected and notable police family - his father is the legendary Phil Kingston, a former police sergeant. However, when Joel is found dead floating in a park lake, DCI Vera Stanhope finds herself investigating both sides of the thin blue line in order to find his killer. A complex family dynamic, tensions at work, and brushes with the underworld all paint a dark and complex picture - Joel was there to protect and serve, but did his stubborn commitment to justice at any price lead to his death, or was he killed to stop him revealing a secret that would destroy someone's life? Joel was also a tenacious and ambitious young police officer... but was all that youthful energy and vigour aimed in the right direction? Vera steps on toes and ruffles a few police feathers as she searches for answers as to why PC Joel Kingston is no longer on the beat.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on the novels by Peter Robinson. A man and a woman claiming to be social workers come to Katy Heath's house and tell her that they need to take her son Kyle away - Katy complies, but when the boy fails to reappear and the couple prove to be unknown to social services, DCI Alan Banks is drawn into a full-scale search for the child. After a search of Katy's house reveals a drugs connection and several witnesses - including Kyle's father - contradict her version of events, Banks begins to question whether she is telling the truth. DI Helen Morton is asked by Banks to try and win Katy's confidence, but dealing with her own problems appears to be too much for the detective. Meanwhile, DS Annie Cabbot believes she has found a possible suspect at Kyle's school - as the search becomes ever more desperate, Banks must find a way to reconcile his colleagues' conflicting attitudes before it is too late.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. When the body on the moors is identified as 11-year-old Andre Petri, the team have a murder enquiry on their hands - meanwhile, Kyle Heath is still missing and Banks wonders if there is a connection between Andre's death and Kyle's disappearance. When a post-mortem shows that Andre died from a massive heroin overdose, it looks like the two boys were linked to illegal drugs - as Banks and Annie set out to uncover the criminal underworld on the Elthorpe Estate, Helen begins to suspect that Kyle's abduction may have been engineered by his own mother in order to extort money from Paul Cain. Helen then receives some shocking news about her own son - and her lack of objectivity threatens to derail the case.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When an old friend of Hathaway's takes their own life, Lewis investigates a link between him and a religious group known as The Garden that he suspects are brainwashing their congregation - however, a serial killer also knows about the organisation and has started to pick off its members one by one, leaving Lewis with only so much time to solve the case before another victim is murdered.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: After a night on guard outside Freddie's house, Donna is torn when she realises her mum's court case will be starting shortly. Pearl is shocked to be caught red handed by a half-naked Alan.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ted and Tina bop to some early disco whilst they get No.8 ready for the party. Lloyd warns Becky that Michelle’s worked out that Steve had a one night stand with another bird. Ken tells Ashley how Irma Ogden was an amateur artist and enjoyed copying Lowry’s paintings. Ashey’s disappointed to discover his ‘Lowry’ is a fake. Mel and Darryl arrive at No.8 for the party. Tina tells David she’s invited quite a few friends. Teresa’s annoyed by the music coming from No.8.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina and David both hungover survey the post party damage at No.8. Sally takes photos of Rosie’s scratches intent on going to the police and reporting Teresa for assault. Kevin tries to talk her out of it. It’s Jason’s birthday. He’s pleased to receive a card from Becky but embarrassed to see posters all over the place announcing it’s his birthday. Michelle overhears Leanne on the phone to Steve and her suspicions grow. Sally goes round to No.6 and confronts Teresa.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has his hands full when an elderly archaeologist dies suspiciously and important documents appear to have been stolen from the victim. He also has to deal with trout being poached from Lord Ashfordly's lake and Greengrass deciding to do a spot of treasure hunting! Aunt Eileen plays detective when she visits an old, ruined abbey, causing concern for Greengrass as he searches for buried booty. With Blaketon in hot pursuit, the pair find themselves trapped together underground inside a tunnel that collapses. Their joint worst nightmare becomes reality when they end up side by side in hospital! Gina celebrates her birthday and Nurse Maggie Bolton invites Nick to dinner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has been receiving complaints about rock music being broadcast from a pirate radio station. Nick and Phil who have been enjoying the music, reluctantly seek out the station which is broadcasting from a ship at sea. They are forced to take action however, when they discover that some of the people involved with the station have been distributing LSD. Nick goes undercover and makes an arresting debut as a DJ! Tragedy strikes when a recently returned young local has a fatal accident after taking the drug. Meanwhile, Greengrass and his friend Joseph decide to brew their own whisky - with explosive results!

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. It's Portwenn Fun Day and the village is buzzing with excitement about this major fundraising event - while PC Penhale is in his element rallying the runners and whipping up support, the event sparks culinary rivalry between Bert and the landlord of the Crab and Lobster pub as they are both keen to take advantage of the day and boost their takings by providing food for the runners and spectators. The seafood soiree and cut-price drinks at the Crab and Lobster look set to win the culinary competition, but Bert smells a rat and calls in PC Penhale to investigate. When the Doc puts paid to Mark's enterprise after diagnosing an infection which means that he must not handle food, Bert seizes the opportunity to take over the soiree... meanwhile, Louisa's mum Eleanor arrives in Portwenn unexpectedly but Louisa is far from happy about her arrival. Martin is even less pleased to see Eleanor, and neither he nor Louisa are happy with her solution to their baby's wailing...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. PC Penhale has an unexpected visit from his ex-wife Maggie, but she appears to have completely forgotten that they split up a couple of years ago - when he tries to tell her that they are no longer married, she accuses him of overreacting and wants to know why he packed his bags and left her. As Penhale struggles with a mixture of distress and elation at seeing Maggie again, he realises that she is clearly not well when she tells him that she thinks that it is April 2008 and that she woke up to find him gone - he tries to ask Martin about Maggie's symptoms without telling him that he is talking about his ex-wife, but he is also terrified of losing Maggie again and wants to make the most of every moment of being back together. Meanwhile, romance may be in the air for Louisa's mother Eleanor when she meets old school friend Paul, the Doc tries to treat Morwenna when she arrives at work with blood dripping from her foot, and Martin and Louisa finally name their baby.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. When investigative journalist Matt Barber is found dead in a remote village, Banks and his team are faced with a number of leads - Banks then notices a connection between the case and a mysterious death in the 1980s involving members of a cult rock band. As he begins to unpick decades of lies, he is all too aware that the victim's father is Jack Barber, a former senior police officer and candidate in local police commissioner elections - despite his formidable reputation, DI Helen Morton is convinced that Jack is obstructing the enquiry in some way. Banks is then shaken to the core when a link between a suspect and DS Annie Cabbot reveals secrets from her personal life which throw their relationship into question...

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. With David Hornby now a suspect in the case, Annie is forced to admit that the father of her baby knows nothing about her pregnancy - Banks tries to be supportive, but Annie soon finds that juggling the affections of her boss and her ex-lover leads to a difficult choice. When Banks and Helen learn that Ian Basset has returned to the country, the surviving members of The Crystal Kiss are reunited and the trio seem more bonded than ever - Annie then makes a discovery about Martin Harford's confession in the John Gaunt case and learns that Jack Barber was the original investigating officer. Helen believes that she has the evidence she needs to push Barber harder, but when Banks hears of a mysterious tape recording that appears to bind both Jack and The Crystal Kiss together, he realises that he is in a race against time to find the tape and understand its significance if he has any hope of uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama. When Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of a young orphan, forensic evidence leads them to suspect there is a link with an old rock band on the verge of a comeback - following a report of a disturbance of the peace, Lewis pays a visit to the mansion of rock legend Richie Maguire. Once there, Lewis is shocked to see Esme Ford, an iconic singer who faked her own death 35 years before - it seems Lewis's favourite band are on the verge of a comeback, but Lewis is not the only person keen to see the band reform.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Blakey discovers that Stan and Jack are biting the hand that feeds them.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Fearful Symmetry: When a babysitter is found dead, Lewis and Hathaway are drawn into diverse new worlds including squats, swinging suburbia, primate labs and fetish photography. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep3

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The Indelible Stain: Lewis and Hathaway investigate when a controversial American academic is murdered after speaking at Oxford's Department of Criminology. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep4

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. May 1966 - Endeavour returns to Oxford City Police after a four-month absence from duty and is reunited with Thursday. Meanwhile, a Broad Street parade celebrating the might of Britain's military accomplishments is soured by a rash student stunt and thrown into sharp relief when an anonymous man plummets to his death from a nearby council building - a clutch of business cards bearing multiple identities suggest the death was more than just a routine suicide, and Endeavour flexes his gumshoe muscles to uncover the corpse's identity in a solitary pursuit that builds to a trip to London with troubling consequences. As a concerned Thursday looks on, the young Morse pulls two seemingly unrelated cases into the fray - an anguished father who is searching for a missing daughter and a smash-and-grab robbery of medieval artefacts at Oxford's Beaufort College - as he risks all to bring those responsible to justice.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Ben Jones investigate a land feud involving two farming dynasties which explodes into violence - trouble seems to be brewing in the pretty village of Ford Florey when a tract of waste ground dubbed the Swamp becomes the focus of a land dispute between two old agricultural families. Tensions are increased further after a band of travellers also lay claim to the site with a view to developing it into a place where they can settle - matters come to a head at the town's annual Fayre. While some villagers are taking part in a shootout reconstruction at a Wild West show, a woman is shot for real - she turns out to be the farm manager for one of the feuding families and the timing of her death raises questions. Barnaby and Jones launch a murder investigation and uncover a series of seething grudges within the village before another person is killed - does the Swamp hold the key to identifying the murderer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: On a dark night in the village of March Magna, Barnaby's wife Joyce swerves her car to narrowly miss a shadowy figure in the road... or so she thinks. Later that night a body is discovered in the old cemetery - did Joyce hit someone after all, or was the victim - who seems to have plenty of enemies - killed by one of the villagers? Barnaby and Jones have their work cut out as all the villagers seem to be hiding something, but is it murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Piano student Zoe Stock has won a place at the Devington Manor Winter School led by internationally renowned musician Sir Michael Fielding when, from the riverbank in the grounds of the manor, she sees a woman jump from the bridge and disappear underwater - when Barnaby and Jones start investigating the possible drowning, they discover unsavoury connections to the past that could prove lethal 20 years later. Can they intervene before the body count escalates, and will the talented Zoe survive her master class?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Betrayal, infidelity and blackmail fester as plans to re-enact a Victorian prizefight turn nasty - and even DCI Barnaby finds his judgement clouded by an old friend. Midsomer Morchard prepares to welcome back local boxer John Kinsella from his world title fight victory in New York - Kinsella is returning with his ruthless and controlling promoter Frank Bishop to take part in a re-enactment of a match from 1860. When Bishop arrives, he goes to see solicitor Giles Braithwaite but instead finds the lawyer dead - meanwhile, trainer Teddy Molloy is working with another fighter called Ken Tuohy, who suspects Kinsella of a dalliance with his fiancee. There are plenty of other grudges and secrets simmering in the village, with revelations of discord, adultery, gambling and Giles's assistant Iris being accused of blackmail. When it comes time for the re-enactment, Tuohy takes the place of Kinsella's opponent and attacks Kinsella - Bishop is then found dead. Can Barnaby find the killer?

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. The murder of a woman discovered in her flat initially presents as a break-in gone wrong but soon appears to be something more and leads Grace to question whether this attack was targeted - the victim Hannah Belling, a psychiatrist and founder of a popular mental health app, was well liked, but it becomes clear that she had enemies as Grace delves deeper. A number of compelling suspects present themselves - an ex-husband causing an acrimonious divorce, an obsessive stalker fired from Hannah's company, a missing brother with a criminal past, and a mysterious lover as the team also discover that Hannah's office was broken into a few days before her death - did she have something that her attacker would kill for? When blood found in Hannah's flat then reveals a chilling discovery, Roy realises that Hannah's killer is just within reach and that her death isn't the only secret they are keeping as the painful truth at the heart of the murder turns Grace's world upside down.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: DI Frost investigates if three male bodies found buried naked in the shape of a triangle are part of a satanic ritual, but will closer analysis lead him in a different direction? Meanwhile, ruthless millionaire press baron James Callum is determined to make his mark on Denton and will stop at nothing to get what he wants - will Frost be able to stop Callum in his tracks before his actions lead to fatal consequences?

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew Ray - and ambitions to move into Europe... however, Ray seems more susceptible to a con than Arthur's customers, but when Arthur is aghast when he accepts a bouncing cheque, Ray soon proves himself brighter than his uncle had suspected.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is visited by his aunt Phoebe - a Pulitzer Prize-winning playwright who claims that she is being stalked by a killer - but the revelation that she has incipient Alzheimer's disease casts doubt on her story.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part episode of the classic US detective drama. A murder seems to be the work of a killer that Theo shot years ago - as he questions if he killed the wrong man, Kojak also recalls a lost romance from the same period.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Escape Route: Simon Templar embarks on another adventure. The Saint is sent to jail to smash a large-scale prison escape organisation run by callous killers. [SL,S] S5 Ep14

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Harry falls hopelessly in love with a woman he meets at a fair, but his boasting quickly lands him in hot water.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police drama series. A Turkish police officer gets Regan involved in a top-secret government deal.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Eight bots are left in the sixth series' World Championship quarter-finals - just four fights to the death will decide who moves on to the semi-finals and two steps away from championship glory and the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Rick is arrested for allegedly killing a hitman hired to murder his mentor Icepick, Thomas finds himself in the midst of a tangled investigation, especially when Rick doesn't deny any of the charges and gives a full confession. However, it is not long before Thomas is on the trail of the real culprit with the help of a resourceful accountant.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic US detective drama. Finding himself suspended, Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover whether he shot the wrong man or not.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Edward Woodward guest stars in the drama series following the adventures of suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint saves the life of a British colony's prime minister.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry Crawford retires from the fire brigade and Ken Boon is forced to resign when his lungs are damaged while rescuing a boy from a blaze - Harry buys seedy hotel The Grand while Ken buys a caravan called The Ponderosa and tries to make a living as a market gardener. When Harry suggests that Ken should supplement his income by offering to do odd jobs for people, he places an advert in the local paper - his first client is Barney Spitz, a pop music promoter who wants Ken to dress up in an old fireman's uniform and star in a pop video.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert bent on revenge.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order nestling just off of the A2.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank explore an 1879 opera house that has been left untouched since the 1930s, Danielle receives some information on a rare gas pump, and Frank meets a 94-year-old collector

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: Real road racing from the returning Bob Smith Spring Cup in Scarborough, the opening round of the King of the Roads.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing sequel. When he loses a highly-publicised virtual boxing match to ex-champ Rocky Balboa, reigning heavyweight titleholder Mason Dixon retaliates by challenging the Italian to a nationally-televised 10-round exhibition bout. To the surprise of his son and friends, Rocky agrees to come out of retirement and face an opponent who is faster, stronger, and 30 years younger than him - with the odds stacked firmly against Rocky, he takes on Dixon in what will become the greatest fight in boxing history and a hard-hitting, action-packed battle of the ages.

programme.title: Kojak

programme.title: The Saint

An amnesiac can't even remember his own name - the only thing he knows is that he has a great deal of money with him and no idea where it came from or how he acquired his wealth, so Ken lends his services as an investigator.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. New recruit Bob Hargreaves joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but is the newcomer up to it? Jack Regan thinks not, but nobody seems to share his view...

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got the more important matter of a cash flow problem on his mind.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jesse must survive the arctic wilderness and cross a frozen river alone to reach the isolated town of Bettles. Elsewhere, Lisa Kelly is back in action, but the slippery slopes of the Dalton will make her road to redemption a dangerous one.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dalton rookie Ray Veilleux drives into a trucker's worst nightmare when he's distracted for a second, Lisa roars up the Dalton with an unwieldy bear cage in tow, and trouble is heating up for the Polar Bear when he ignores his poorly loaded cargo.
