programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team conceals in suburbia a rock singer threatened by terrorists, until a nosy neighbor blows the whistle.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team journeys to a South American jungle to rescue Murdock's kidnapped therapist (Richard Anderson); guest Jeannetta Arnette.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The mob forces a children's TV-show host (Arte Johnson) to endorse cheap, unsafe Uncle Buckle-Up dolls.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Agents detour Murdock to South America when he embarks on a Hawaiian trip he won on "Wheel of Fortune"; guests Pat Sajak, Vanna White.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team works with the Soviets to prevent an insane Soviet general from triggering World War III; guest William Smith.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Face pursues a lifelong dream and cons his way into a posh country club, only to discover counterfeiters working off the seventh green.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and KITT battle a military hovercraft hijacked for sale to a weaponeer.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A hateful man (William Windom) seeks revenge against the husband (John Crawford) of his former lover by sabotaging his race car. With David Hasselhoff, Jourdan Fremin, Norbert Weisser.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael (David Hasselhoff) goes undercover when a sinister man (Peter Brown) uses female prison inmates to commit robberies. With Julianne McNamara, Rosalind Ingledew.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A club-owner (Shelley Berman) and singer's (Tom Sullivan) neighborhood project upsets a greedy real-estate magnate.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Although he's being chased by a crazed assailant, Michael takes time to marry his longtime girlfriend.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: An electronics genius seeking recognition for his work at the Foundation reprograms KITT.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A Foundation supporter's illegal logging is exposed when he asks Devon's help.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics try to boost the confidence of a trainee who has doubts about his readiness to take on emergency duties in the field.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Brackett cares for an ailing foreign dignitary; the paramedics rescue a helicopter pilot, deliver a baby and prevent a suicide jump.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage diagnoses tonsillitis for DeSoto, who claims to have had his tonsils removed; McCall is reunited with an old love (Robert Alda).

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage's and DeSoto's stands on honesty are put to the test when people who withhold vital information experience different consequences.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A woman believes her dead sister is the cause of accidents in her home; a man is trapped underwater in his car with the doors jammed.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Station 51's mascot, Boot, won't eat; accidents befall a woman attempting to cook a meal; a man nearly dies from an aspirin overdose.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics conduct several rescues under a shadow of guilt after being accused of stealing from a patient; guest Jo Anne Worley.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Tubbs (Philip Michael Thomas) considers marriage to a former love (Pam Grier) who has returned to help a drug-addicted friend. With Don Johnson and Edward James Olmos.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Miami police detective Sonny Crockett reluctantly teams with New York-bred newcomer Ricardo Tubbs.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Vice detectives Crockett and Tubbs join forces to capture a Colombian drug kingpin in the pilot episode of the series.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs are skeptical of rumors the undercover FBI agent (Ed O'Neill) has betrayed their operation.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs must enlist an unreliable petty thief (Charlie Barnett) to help bust a Jamaican drug operation.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Tubbs works to save Crockett and family from falling victim to an Argentine assassin hired by drug boss Calderone.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A concert deal appears shaky when Face inadvertently books Boy George & Culture Club into a rowdy cowboy nightclub.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A military-academy commandant murders to protect his career and prevent his school's conversion to a coed junior college.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo's Mexico cruise is disrupted when an automobile executive kills his blackmailing lover, the ship's singer, then frames a musician.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: After killing his mother-in-law, an electronics magnate's alibi is a video security system.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A psychiatrist (George Hamilton) romances a wealthy patient (Lesley Ann Warren) then uses her in his alibi after killing her husband (Stephen Elliott).

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired actress/dancer stages her wealthy husband's suicide after he refuses to finance her Broadway comeback.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A foreign dignitary murders his rival then disguises the crime as part of a robbery blamed on college protesters.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cunning advertising consultant leading a double life as a spy tries to cover up the details of a homicide.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer , a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew , whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defence lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit and run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stock broker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) comes out of a lake in his coffin and makes a Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Miss Pettigrew Lives for a Day
programme.desc: A middle-aged British governess (Frances McDormand) gets a taste of the glamorous life when she takes a job as the caretaker of an American celebrity (Amy Adams).","large":"It's 1939 and governess Guinevere Pettigrew finds herself out of work and on the bread line. Middle-aged and running out of options, Miss Pettigrew takes an uncharacteristic gamble when, after being refused work at an employment agency, she steals the details of a juicy assignment and pursues the job herself.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter reunites with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.","large":"In 1979 young Donna, Tanya and Rosie graduate from Oxford University -- leaving Donna free to embark on a series of adventures throughout Europe. On her journeys, she makes the acquaintances of Harry, Bill and Sam -- the latter whom she falls in love with, but he's also the man who breaks her heart. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter, Sophie, dreams of renovating a taverna while reuniting with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love.","large":"Nine intertwined journeys examine the complexities of the one emotion that connects all individuals, love. Among these individuals is David, the handsome, newly elected British prime minister who falls for a junior staffer. Sarah is a graphic designer whose devotion to her mentally ill brother complicates her love life. Harry, a married man, is tempted by his attractive new secretary.

programme.title: The Wedding Date
programme.desc: A desperate woman (Debra Messing) pays a male escort (Dermot Mulroney) $6,000 to accompany her to London for her sister's wedding.","large":"With the wedding of her younger sister (Amy Adams) fast approaching, Kat Ellis (Debra Messing) faces the undesirable prospect of traveling alone to London for the ceremony. While this is bad enough, Jeffrey (Jeremy Sheffield), the man who left her as they moved closer to marriage, happens to be the groom's best man. Determined to show everyone -- most of all Jeffrey -- that her romantic life is as full and thrilling as ever, Kat hires a charming male escort (Dermot Mulroney) as her date.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: Bowfinger
programme.desc: A broke producer (Steve Martin) hires a nerd (Eddie Murphy) who looks like a famous actor and other misfits to star in his latest movie.","large":"On the verge of bankruptcy and desperate for his big break, aspiring filmmaker Bobby Bowfinger (Steve Martin) concocts a crazy plan to make his ultimate dream movie. Rallying a ragtag team that includes a starry-eyed ingénue (Heather Graham), a has-been diva (Christine Baranski) and a film studio gofer (Jamie Kennedy), he sets out to shoot a blockbuster featuring the biggest star in Hollywood, Kit Ramsey (Eddie Murphy) -- only without letting Ramsey know he's in the picture.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A bumbling British agent (Rowan Atkinson) tries to find a French billionaire (John Malkovich) who has stolen the crown jewels.","large":"Pascal Sauvage (John Malkovich), a villain intent on stealing Britain's Crown Jewels, has murdered the country's top undercover agents, and mediocre spy Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) is ordered to prevent further mayhem. But even with help from quick-thinking sidekick Bough (Ben Miller), the goofy agent lands himself in one precarious situation after another. Only when he meets up with Interpol crime-fighter Lorna Campbell (Natalie Imbruglia) is Johnny able to chip away at Pascal's defenses.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: The bumbling secret agent (Rowan Atkinson) uses his questionable combat skills and high-tech gadgets to protect a Chinese leader from a band of assassins.","large":"After a disastrous mission in Mozambique, British agent Johnny English (Rowan Atkinson) has retreated to a Tibetan monastery to try to forget his shame. But when he receives an urgent call from MI-7 to lead a mission that only he can handle, English is back in action. Using his questionable combat skills and an assortment of high-tech gadgets, English, along with his new partner, Agent Tucker (Daniel Kaluuya), must foil a plot to kill the Chinese premier.

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: An eccentric, accident-prone British art caretaker (Rowan Atkinson) wreaks havoc at the U.S. unveiling of "Whistler's Mother."","large":"At the Royal National Gallery in London, the bumbling Mr. Bean (Rowan Atkinson) is a guard with good intentions who always seems to destroy anything he touches. Unless, of course, he's sleeping on the job. With the chairman (John Mills) blocking Bean's firing, the board decides to send him to a Los Angeles art gallery under false credentials. When Bean arrives, his chaos-causing ways are as sharp as ever, and curator David Langley (Peter MacNicol) has the unenviable task of keeping Bean in line.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: The teenage children of a lesbian couple (Julianne Moore, Annette Bening) seek out their biological father (Mark Ruffalo) and make him a part of their lives.","large":"Lesbian couple Jules (Julianne Moore) and Nic (Annette Bening) have been together for almost 20 years and have two teenage offspring named Joni and Laser, who were conceived via artificial insemination. Unbeknown to their mothers, Joni and Laser seek out their biological father, a restaurateur named Paul (Mark Ruffalo). Complications arise when the teens bond with Paul and invite him into their lives.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: A man (Ben Stiller) fears the worst when he accompanies his fiancée's uptight father (Robert De Niro) and mother to meet his free-spirited mom and dad (Dustin Hoffman).","large":"Now that Greg Focker is "in" with his soon-to-be in-laws, Jack and Dina Byrnes, it looks like smooth sailing for him and his fiancée, Pam. But that's before Pam's parents meet Greg's parents, the Fockers. The hyper-relaxed Fockers and the tightly-wound Byrnes are woefully mismatched from the start, and no matter how hard Greg and Pam try, there is just no bringing their families together. This all adds up to a disastrously funny time of getting to know you.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: When a woman brings her boyfriend home for her sister's wedding, her father, a former CIA agent, takes an instant dislike to him.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: As two clans descend on the scene of young twins' birthday, Greg Focker's moonlighting at a pharmaceutical company threatens to derail his position of trust with Jack, his uptight father-in-law.","large":"After 10 years of marriage and two children, it seems that Greg Focker has finally earned a place in the "circle of trust" of his uptight father-in-law, Jack. However, Greg is moonlighting with a drug company, which raises Jack's suspicions. As two clans descend on the scene of the young twins' birthday party, Greg must find a way through myriad misunderstandings to prove to Jack -- once and for all -- that he is worthy of being the next family patriarch.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his future brother-in-law, a fast-talking trainee, tangle with Atlanta's most-dangerous criminal.","large":"For two years, security guard Ben has tried to convince James, a veteran cop, that he is worthy of James' sister, Angela. When Ben is finally accepted into the police academy, James decides to test his mettle by inviting him along on a shift deliberately designed to scare the trainee. However, events take an unexpected turn when their wild night leads to Atlanta's most-notorious criminal and Ben's rapid-fire mouth proves as dangerous as the bullets whizzing by them.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: As his wedding day approaches, Ben heads to Miami with his soon-to-be brother-in-law James to bring down a drug dealer who's supplying the dealers of Atlanta with product.","large":"Rookie lawman Ben Barber (Kevin Hart) aspires to become a detective like James Payton (Ice Cube), his future brother-in-law. James reluctantly takes Ben to Miami to follow up on a lead that's connected to a drug ring. The case brings them to a homicide detective and a computer hacker who reveals evidence that implicates a respected businessman. It's now up to James and Ben to prove that charismatic executive Antonio Pope is actually a violent crime lord who rules southern Florida's drug trade.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A young couple suffering from arrested development are forced to live next to a fraternity house after the birth of their newborn baby.

programme.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: A man (Seth Rogen), his pregnant wife (Rose Byrne) and their former neighbor (Zac Efron) clash with wild and rebellious sorority sisters.","large":"Life is good for Mac Radner (Seth Rogen) and pregnant wife Kelly (Rose Byrne) until the unruly sisters of Kappa Nu move in next door. As the loud parties threaten the sale of their home, the couple turn to ex-neighbor and one-time enemy Teddy Sanders (Zac Efron) for help. Now united with the former college student, the trio devises schemes to get the wild sorority off the block. Unfortunately, the rebellious young women refuse to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor she's profiling.","large":"Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: Pralay The Destroyer
programme.desc: Starring: Sai Srinivas Bellamkonda,Pooja Hegde. A baby survives a brutal massacre. Years later, destiny leads him back to the gang that destroyed his family, setting the stage for revenge, justice, and an epic showdown.

programme.title: Sam Bahadur
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Fatima Sana Shaikh. Sam Manekshaw fought five wars, served four decades, and still had time for iconic one-liners. A hero in boots, he became India's first Field Marshal-with style!

programme.title: Bharat
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Katrina Kaif. Amidst the chaos of the India-Pakistan partition, Bharat is tasked with safeguarding his family. He honors his father's wish, becoming their steadfast guardian through a turbulent era.

programme.title: Pataas
programme.desc: Starring: Nandamuri Kalyan Ram,Ashutosh Rana. Kalyan Sinha works with corrupt politician GK until his best friend is killed. The tragedy forces him to confront his choices and fight to reclaim his integrity.

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Ileana. Naina leaves wanderer Kalyan and agrees to wed a cop, only to discover he is after Kalyan, pulling her back into turmoil.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay,Prashanth. Gandhi, a secret agent, loses his family to mission fallout. Years later, he meets a boy like his son, just as new threats emerge.

programme.title: Extra Ordinary Man
programme.desc: Starring: Nithiin,Sreeleela. Abhinay, once lost in artistic struggle, discovers love that redefines his path. A sudden opportunity to act in a movie changes everything, pushing him toward fame and self-discovery.

programme.title: Sikandar
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Rashmika Mandanna. A tragic accident pushes the powerful Sikandar to protect the less fortunate by standing up to corruption and greed - using any means necessary.

programme.title: The Real Tiger
programme.desc: Starring: Mahesh Babu,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. After years, politician Shankar wakes up from a coma. His son, a cop, recreates everything as would be expected by his father in order to save him from any shock. He also hunts for his father's foes.
